title: Hidey Hidey Debris
description: Makes debris more natural by embedding it in netherrack
body:
# Preamble

Ancient debris always looked weird being out & exposed. Not a single bit being imbedded in the netherrack.

This ~~mod~~ resource pack fixes that!

As a consequence of this, it's also harder to spot, so keep an eye out when mining!

# Versions

~~This should work in all version that have ancient debris, although it was made in 1.19.2.~~

Designed specifically for 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, & 1.19.3. But should work for other versions.

# Connected Textures (optional)

Was made with the CTM format in mind, but also ported to the Optifine format (aka the one Continuity uses).

Connected texture mods can be found here or in file dependencies if the mod is on Modrinth

### Forge:

*On 1.19.2 ancient debris loses its smooth shading, switch your forge version to 43.1.3 to fix it*

1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2 - [CTM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm)
### Fabric:

1.16.5 - [CTMF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm-fabric)

1.18.2/1.19.2 - [CTMRF](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-refabricated)/[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

1.19.3 - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (not uploaded yet, look at their discord)

# Works Well With

[Large Ore Deposits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/large-ore-deposits)

*insert my yet-to-be-release modpack here*
